Sustainability Literacy Assessment

In line with our commitment to strengthening sustainability awareness, the International Accreditations and Rankings Unit of the Learning, Practice and Research Center at Istanbul Okan University has developed a Sustainability Literacy Assessment.

This assessment aims to evaluate the university community’s knowledge, attitudes, and behaviors regarding sustainable practices and the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

We invite our students, academic staff, and administrative personnel to participate in this short assessment. Your participation will help us identify areas for improvement and further enhance sustainability initiatives at our university.

The assessment consists of 20 multiple-choice questions and 10 Likert-scale questions, designed to measure knowledge, attitudes, and behaviors related to sustainability.

To take the test, which is available in both Turkish and English, please click on the link below.
